upasargachandrika.example_text: prayastaM syAt susaMskftam ityamaraH suzWu rAdDam
'devasya heqo'vayAsisIzWAH' (f0 414) apanayetyarTaH avapUrvo yAsirvinASe vartata iti sAyaRaH
'vyaktaM rAmABizekArTe ihAyasyati DarmarAw' (rA0 21465) Ayasyati AyAsavAnBavati prayatate udyuNkte
'nAyasyasi tapasyantI' (Bawwi0 670) nAyasyasi klizyase maTanAyastErbAhuBiH maTanAyastA manTanaklAntA avaloqanaKinnA bAhavaH tEH
'snehamUlAni duHKAni dehajAni BayAni ca SokaharzO taTAyAsaH sarvaM snehAt pravartate' (BA0) AyAsaH klamaH KedaH SramaH
'AyasyotpAwitAn keSAn yo naro nAvabuDyate' (caraka0 indriya0 88) Ayasya balAdAkfzya
